observation: Boubacar prefers a lean first draft before adding complexity. Start minimal, expand only when needed.
Boubacar works in daily build cycles. Skills should be deployable same-session, not multi-day projects.
Boubacar structures consulting outputs as: one bold diagnosis + actionable recommendations. Avoid wishy-washy multi-answer outputs.
leGriot voice NEVER fabricates stories. Signals hypotheticals as 'Imagine if...' Always authentic.
Boubacar prefers Telegram over WhatsApp for bot interactions. Default to Telegram for personal agent outputs.
